options.name: -hard
options.description: If present, create a hard clock spine

options.name: -name
options.description: user-defined identifier for this clock spine

options.name: -x
options.description: The X value of a vertical clock spine's target line

options.name: -xmax
options.description: The maximum X value of objects on a horizontal spine, and the right edge of the hard spine area

options.name: -xmin
options.description: The minimum X value of objects on a horizontal spine, and the left edge of the hard spine area

options.name: -y
options.description: The Y value of a horizontal clock spine's target line

options.name: -ymax
options.description: The maximum Y value of objects on a vertical spine, and the top edge of the hard spine area

options.name: -ymin
options.description: The minimum Y value of objects on a vertical spine, and the bottom edge of the hard spine area
